text.title: Instagram Ads Playbook Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion DTC beauty launch. Reels 60% / Stories 20 / Feed 20. UGC for cold. 9:16 primary. Shopping tags on.
example.note: Reels-first respected; UGC cold; frequency caps in band; Shopping tags enabled.
